description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a vibrant blue background, prominently featuring the Faragello brand logo in red and white at the top center. The front and back panels display large, detailed images of orange slices, visually indicating the orange flavor. The text 'ORANGE PREMIUM DRINK' is printed in bold white and blue letters, along with a volume indication of 200 ml. One side panel contains a detailed nutritional information table, while the opposite side shows recycling symbols, a barcode, and additional product information in multiple languages. The top of the carton is sealed, with a small triangular fold typical of single-serve juice cartons.
description: A blue rectangular juice carton with orange slice graphics, Faragello branding, and nutritional information on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, orange slice illustration, and 'ORANGE BOISSON PREMIUM' text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional facts panel and part of the blue and orange design.
description_view_2: Back view with similar orange slice graphics and 'ORANGE PREMIUM DRINK' text, mirroring the front.
description_view_3: Side view with recycling symbols, barcode, and multilingual product information.
